src: The next generation of tooling for Spring Boot, including support for Cloud Foundry manifest files, Concourse CI pipeline definitions, BOSH deployment manifests, and more... - Available for Visual Studio Code, Cursor, Eclipse, and Theia
ja: Spring Boot向け次世代ツールセット。Cloud Foundryマニフェスト、Concourse CIパイプライン定義、BOSHデプロイメントマニフェストなどをサポート。Visual Studio Code、Cursor、Eclipse、Theia向けに提供。
